title: Pre-Crisis Peak
description: Markets at all-time highs. Everyone feels invincible. The word 'subprime' hasn't entered everyday vocabulary yet.

title: Global Financial Crisis
description: Lehman Brothers collapses. Markets crash 40%. The biggest financial crisis since the Great Depression.
mentorLine: Lehman Brothers just collapsed. Markets are down 40%. This is the moment 92% of investors make their worst mistake. What do you do?

title: The Bottom
description: Markets hit rock bottom. Nobody knows it yet. The bravest investors are buying.
beatLine: March 2009. The absolute bottom. Nobody knows it yet, but this is the greatest buying opportunity of a generation.

title: Recovery Begins
description: Markets have recovered 60% from the bottom. The crisis feels like a distant memory.
beatLine: 2010: Recovery is real. If you held through 2008, you're already seeing gains. Patience is paying off.

title: European Debt Crisis
description: Greece might go bankrupt. European markets shaking. Your bonds are holding steady — that's diversification working.
mentorLine: Greece might go bankrupt. European markets are shaking. Your bonds are holding steady — that's diversification working.

title: Bull Run Begins
description: Markets pass their pre-crisis highs for the first time in 5 years.
beatLine: 2013: Five years since the crash. Markets just passed their pre-crisis highs. Those who held are finally whole again.

title: Swiss Franc Shock
description: The Swiss National Bank removes the EUR/CHF floor. The franc surges 30% in minutes. Swiss exporters in shock.
mentorLine: The Swiss franc just surged 30% in minutes. Swiss exporters are in shock. If you hold foreign assets, you just took a hit.

title: Low Volatility Era
description: Volatility near historic lows. Optimism everywhere.
beatLine: 2017: Volatility near historic lows. Optimism everywhere. Sound familiar?

title: Longest Bull Run
description: The longest bull run in history. Nobody remembers what a crash feels like.
beatLine: 2019: The longest bull run in history. Nobody remembers what a crash feels like.

title: COVID-19 Pandemic
description: Global pandemic. Fastest crash in market history — 30% in 3 weeks. But the fastest recovery too.
mentorLine: Global pandemic declared. Fastest crash in market history — 30% in 3 weeks. But here's what nobody expected: the fastest recovery too.

title: Post-COVID Boom
description: Markets at new all-time highs. Free money era. Everyone's an investor.
beatLine: 2021: Markets at new all-time highs. Interest rates at zero. Your neighbor is trading meme stocks. Everything's going up.

title: Inflation & Rate Shock
description: Inflation at 40-year highs. Central banks hiking rates. Bonds AND stocks falling together for the first time in decades.
mentorLine: Inflation at 40-year highs. Central banks hiking rates. For the first time in decades, bonds AND stocks are falling together.
